items.title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC's first loss of 2026 knocks them off the top
items.summary: LAFC had been practically perfect in 2026, but the Angelenos first loss of the year cleared room for a new No. 1 in this edition of MLS Power Rankings.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: ATP hits Medvedev in wallet for smashing racket
items.summary: Former No. 1 Daniil Medvedev was fined $7,000 for unsportsmanlike conduct after he smashed his racket seven times during a loss at the Monte Carlo Masters.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Steelers visit with QB Taylen Green on Monday
